> run the full integration suite against the new search backend

Starting integration suite.

  Bash(npm run test:integration -- --backend=opensearch)
  ⎿  > app@1.0.0 test:integration
  ⎿  > vitest run tests/integration --backend=opensearch
  ⎿
  ⎿   ❯ tests/integration/search.spec.ts (12)
  ⎿     ✓ indexes documents on insert (842ms)
  ⎿     ✓ removes documents on delete (311ms)
  ⎿     ✗ reranks results by recency (timeout)

MCP error -32603: Internal error invoking tool "opensearch.query"
  at McpClient.callTool (node:internal/mcp/client:412:19)
  at async SearchAdapter.query (src/search/adapter.ts:88:14)
  at async Object.<anonymous> (tests/integration/search.spec.ts:147:22)

Caused by: Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:9200
    at TCPConnectWrap.afterConnect [as oncomplete] (node:net:1605:16) {
  errno: -111,
  code: 'ECONNREFUSED',
  syscall: 'connect',
  address: '127.0.0.1:9200',
  port: 9200
}

The opensearch container appears to be down. I'll stop here so you can bring
the service back up; the other 11 tests passed but the recency-rerank check
can't run without a live backend.
